description_long: This is a freestanding vertical banner display with a sturdy metal frame and two supporting feet at the base for stability. The lower half of the banner features a blue geometric pattern with the word 'seg' and a stylized logo, while the upper half is a blank or translucent panel. The frame appears to be made of metal, likely aluminum, providing both durability and a lightweight structure. The banner is designed for easy visibility and branding in public or commercial spaces. Its slim profile allows it to be placed in high-traffic areas without obstructing movement.
description: A vertical freestanding banner with a blue geometric design and logo on a metal frame, featuring a blank upper panel and two stabilizing feet.
description_view_0: Front view showing the blue geometric banner with logo and the full metal frame.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the slim profile and the two perpendicular support feet at the base.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually similar to the front, showing the back of the banner and frame.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again highlighting the thinness and support feet.
